---
title: "Formation of dysprosium doped yttria (YDy) powders with EPR response"
date: 2026-04-01
author:
  - name: Santos, S.C.
  - name: Rodrigues, O.
  - name: Caldas, L.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Next Materials"
  volume: 11
  doi: "10.1016/j.nxmate.2026.101760"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Formation of dysprosium doped yttria (YDy) powders with EPR response</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
